description:
You are a CRM System Administrator preparing the SuiteCRM environment for the official launch at a wholesale distribution company. Apply company branding and adjust global UI settings by setting the System Name to 'Meridian Wholesale CRM', the Listview items per page to 50, and preventing user customizable layouts. Upload the company logo from /home/ga/Documents/meridian_logo.png. 

SuiteCRM Login credentials — Username: admin / Password: Admin1234!
